audit_items.proof_trace: The deletion `delete s_auctionStarts[asset]` executes on line 367 unconditionally after `_onAuctionEnd` returns on line 366; there is no branching between them. A re-entrancy window exists during `_onAuctionEnd`'s external `safeTransfer` calls while `s_auctionStarts[asset]` is still non-zero, but `bid()` re-entry is neutralised by the zero-balance check (line 438-439), and `performUpkeep` re-entry is blocked by `onlyRole(AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE)`. The post-condition `auctionStarts[asset] == 0` is satisfied on every non-reverting execution.
